item.title: Not Good Enough... Learning From Our Mistakes
item.description: Every project has setbacks, but mistakes bring lessons. What went wrong, and how did it make the team stronger?

item.title: Let’s Talk Footings | The Nantahala Retreat Part 2
item.description: Strong foundations make or break a build. How do footings set the stage for the Nantahala Retreat, and what challenges come with this critical step?
